title: Ingenuity Inlet
description:
Old versions will not work with server! Just a random thing I decided to put together. I like this modpack I made so I want to share it with others. Look for future updates!

Join my server with this modpack (If you want. In description.)
body:
Just a random thing I decided to put together. I like this modpack I made so I want to share it with others. Look for future updates and possible revamp! It was orignaly designed for my server only but I decided to upload this for others enjoyment.

This mod pack is both tech and steampunk with mods like "Tempad" and "Create". This mod pack is designed for entertainment and performance. Performance mods include but not limited to; "Sodium", "More Culling", "Fast IP Ping" and "ModernFix". There's plenty of biomes to explore and villages. Make your house a home with "Handcrafted" and "Bibliocraft"! Make secret bases with "Create" and "SecurityCraft" This mod pack is designed for exploration, multiplayer, adventure and mostly just your enjoyment. We also have FTB quests to give you something more to do! This modpack can be used for singleplayer and LAN or any multiplayer. I will add stuff and remove stuff every now and then mostly from feedback. Explore and find your way to progression by either or both 'beating' Mincraft the usual way or doing all the quests.

Join my server (If you want)
- launch this modpack (works only with this modpack)
- Go to multiplayer
- Add Server
- Put "ingenuityinlet.falixsrv.me" in address (new modpack coming for new server soon, please wait!)
- Name "Ingenuity Inlet" (Or whatever you want)
- If server is offline tell me in dicord, if you cant I appoligies and will get it on soon.

Join my discord server if you want. I have support channels there for this modpack too.
